reviews.text: Conrad Seoul is an old hotel. My friend and I shared a large double queen room. reviews.title: Worst five star hotel ever
reviews.text:
We(me and my family) have visited this hotel more than fifty times. And this time was the worst. I don't think we would be back again.

This time I booked this hotel on a web site that offered promotional options. I didn't know that my room was upgraded and I didn’t not care if it was!! But when I checked in, the staff mentioned it more than five times. Maybe he wanted to let us know how generous they  were? 

And when we got into the room the A/C didn't work very well. So I phoned the front desk asking to change the room. The staff didn't change our room right away, instead she told us to wait in the room till the engineer was ready to check the condition of theA/C, which was very frustrating because the room was not cool while waiting for more than twenty minutes! I had to call again to ask for room-change. I had to insist. I don't understand why she didn't let us move to another room first time
I asked for it.

Eventually she arranged another room for us, saying originally we booked a deluxe room and it was upgraded on the website as a promotion, so if we wanted to change the room we had to move to a deluxe room. But she said she got us an upgraded one as a huge favor. It felt like I was there for a free ride or something. I paid for it!!! 

I already booked a premier room and I didn't know it was upgraded as a promotion, but the staffs kept on saying it (more than 7 times!!) like they were giving us a huge bonus! Who cares if it's deluxe or premier if the room is steaming in August in Seoul!!! 

Last of all, the pool was over crowed with too many people, and I couldn't understand why they didn't set occupancy restriction. It felt like I was staying at a three star hotel. 

When I checked out, the staff didn't say sorry for the incident yesterday and didn't even ask if the staying was okay.

We normally stay at Four seasons but this time we had to visit Hyundai department store so we chose a closer one, which was a big mistake. 

Conrad has changed a lot in a bad way. They have to train their staffs to offer better service. Compared to Fourseasons, they have a long way to go. I would give them  one star out of five.

reviews.title: Have stayed many times but would not do so in future due to the rigid attitude of the staff
reviews.positives: The location and facility of the hotel is good.
reviews.negatives:
Two particular incidents made me feel I would not want to stay in Conrad next time. 1) I am a frequent business traveller and i have stayed in Conrad multiple times. Due to some personal reasons that I would need to change my reservation, but the staff was very strong in their denial of the request despite it was still 2-3 weeks away from the actual date of stay and I offered a few options as well; it made me feel that the staff didn’t try to help but rather, only tried to close the case single-mindedly. 
2) During my stay, for some reason, they deactivated my room card. I used the phone at the floor where I stayed and called the staff for help. Instead of coming up to help, the staff requested that I go down to get my room key reactivates. Once downstairs, I got requested to show the credit card I used for the booking (which I left in my room). I told them it’s not with me and instead I have my passport with me. They claimed that they have to swiped credit card for validation and requested that I go up to the room and bring the card down. At that instant, I was annoyed and asked them why I have to come down again. Later, a manager came and told me that he would go upstairs with me and brought the card down for validation. What I still do not understand is why I need to go through so many troubles for something that’s wrong in their system/database, etc. It made me feel there is no thinking on behalf of the guest and everything is simply ‘this is a rule/policy’. 

Moving forward, really doubt I would be staying on Conrad willingly. For the price it charges, the attitude and service level of the staff is mediocre.

reviews.title: Not bad but in a rude manner.
reviews.text: The overall condition was good. However, the manner of the staff was rude. At check-in, a female staff member who seemed new accidentally charged us twice, and she apologized, saying she would make sure there would be no issues with our lounge access. However, during the evening cocktail hour, another male hotelier came and told us that one person would have to pay an additional fee. So I explained to him that at check-in we had clearly been told that lounge access was included for all four of us. He said he would go and check again and asked us to wait for a moment. But after quite some time, he never came back. When I went to the lobby myself to ask him, he then casually said, “Oh, I checked and there was no issue.” I don’t know if their internal communication is that poor, but it was extremely frustrating. Especially the male hotelier — his attitude was downright rude. It felt like he thought that just because he works at a five-star hotel, he himself must be a five-star human being.

reviews.title: Fine for a Hilton. Conrad? Nah.
reviews.text:
It's a great Hilton.
It's not a Conrad though.
There's no stuffed animal on the bed. Apparently the Conrad Seoul can't afford to give those away...

The room itself was great. Two queen beds with the most fabulous mattress toppers ever, a great room control interface, high ceiling, well-appointed bathroom, and an awesome view.

Breakfast was fine, but most of the food was cold. One would expect a Conrad to serve you breakfast that's at least luke warm. Next time, I'm skipping breakfast and heading outside to the IFC Mall that one can access directly from the lower lobby of the hotel.

Most staff were friendly, but some I had to approach and ask for help before I was tended to. One doesn't feel waited upon at the Conrad Seoul.

Gym was great, swimming pool was nice too.

In summary, it's a great, great hotel. Facilities leave nothing to be desired. It's just not a Conrad. I've been to a few, and this isn't one.

reviews.title: ✨ Conrad Seoul Accommodation Review - King Bed Deluxe Room (Han River View) ✨
reviews.text:
I initially booked a city view, but paid extra on-site to change to a river view (Han River view) 💸 Thanks to that, the view was really satisfying 🌆 I think the biggest advantage of Conrad Seoul is its location and accessibility. It connects directly to Yeouido Station and the IFC Mall, so there’s no need to go outside 🚇, and everything was taken care of inside the IFC Mall, making it really convenient 🍽️☕ There were plenty of dining options, so I had no trouble choosing.

On the day I visited, it was the Chuseok holiday, and nearby convenience stores closed early, but when I inquired at the front desk, they accurately guided me to the convenience store that was still open, which showed attention to detail 👍 However, I was a bit disappointed that the staff's voice was a bit soft during check-in, so I couldn’t hear everything clearly, but it wasn’t a major inconvenience 🙂 

I had breakfast at 'Zest' 🍳 Overall, there weren’t a lot of options, but it felt like each dish was given a lot of care. The fruit was really fresh 🍉, and the bakery items were of high quality, which made me happy 🥐 It was a breakfast that felt more about 'dedication' than variety.

The Han River view was, as expected of Conrad, truly beautiful at night 🌃 I had no regrets about the view at all. However, I was a bit disappointed with the cleanliness — there were hairs left on the table and in the sink 😕 Considering it’s a luxury hotel, I hope they could be a bit more thorough in this regard.

They reflected all the special requests I made regarding my 'birthday visit' very well 🎂 and I was very satisfied with that 💖 Overall, I would rate it ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ out of 5! It’s a good hotel to stay at for a vacation, but it wasn’t moving enough for me to want to return 🙂

정성 가득한 후기 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 리버뷰로 변경하신 선택이 만족스러우셨다니 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다. 여의도역 및 IFC몰과의 편리한 연결, 연휴 기간에도 직원의 안내가 도움이 되었다는 말씀은 저희에게 큰 힘이 됩니다.

다만 투숙 도중 불편을 겪으신 부분에 대해 깊이 사과드립니다. 기대하시는 수준에 미치지 못한 부분은 즉시 관련 부서와 공유하여 개선하겠습니다.

조식과 생일 방문 요청 사항이 만족스러우셨다니 다행입니다. 앞으로는 전반적인 서비스 품질과 객실 관리 면에서 더 완성도 있는 경험을 제공해드릴 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다.

다시 한 번 소중한 의견 감사드리며, 다음 방문 시에는 보다 감동적인 경험으로 보답드리겠습니다.

reviews.text: Wonderful stay. Only encountered on problem. I had requested two sheets on my bed. A bottom sheet and another on top of that, and then the duve. As I was checking in I inquired about this request and was assured it had been taken care of. It wasn’t. They sent someone to add the additional sheet. The next day, when the room was made up, they removed the additional sheet. Another trip to the front desk where they kindly recognised the problem and fixed it. Other than that, it was a perfect stay. Great breakfast, outstanding front door staff. All in all, I would highly recommend The Conrad.

reviews.title: Fantastic Han River view hotel
reviews.text: The queen bed was comfortable, and the evening view of the Han River was great, making for a pleasant day. The only downside was that the shower door was broken, and the engineer's visit interrupted my quiet time, but I was mostly satisfied with everything else. By the way, there are no toothbrushes or disposable shower towels, so you should bring your own. I really liked the zest dinner, but there were quite a few fruit flies, which is not befitting of a five-star hotel. It might not be easy to get rid of them, but I think they should definitely spray something after all operations to catch them. With hotel prices reaching 1 million won per night and dinner at 200,000 won, it seems reasonable to expect good upkeep. I believe the experience would be excellent if these minor issues were addressed. Thank you.
reviews.response:
콘래드 서울을 이용해 주시고 상세한 후기를 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.  
한강뷰와 객실, 그리고 제스트 디너를 전반적으로 만족스럽게 이용하셨다니 기쁩니다.  

다만 샤워실 문 문제로 불편을 겪으신 점과 레스토랑 내 날파리로 인해 불쾌하셨던 부분에 대해 진심으로 사과드립니다.  
남겨주신 말씀은 관련 부서와 즉시 공유하여 시설 점검과 위생 관리가 더욱 철저히 이루어질 수 있도록 개선하겠습니다.  

소중한 피드백 감사드리며, 다음 방문 시에는 불편함 없이 완벽한 경험을 선사해드릴 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다.

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay at Conrad Seoul.

We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed the view from your room and found it spacious and well maintained. It is also wonderful to know that our concierge team provided kind and attentive assistance by using a translation app to better support you. Your recognition of their effort is truly appreciated.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the bathtub drain. This is certainly not the level of comfort we aim to provide, and we regret that it affected your overall impression of your stay. Your comments have been shared with the relevant team so that this issue can be reviewed and addressed to prevent a similar experience in the future.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with a more seamless and satisfying stay.

Warm regards,
Conrad Seoul

reviews.title: Decent stay with Han River view at Conrad
reviews.text: I stayed for 4 nights at Conrad with a large group, and this was the last leg of my travel in Korea. The check in and concierge staff was excellent. Wanted to give a shout out to the front desk staff, Joy, who was helping with our check in. She was extremely friendly and polite, and helped to arrange for our requests to be met as well. Truly outstanding service from her! Aside from that, the room was clean and facilities were well maintained. There is also a Dyson hair dryer provided, which was really handy. The best part of the room had to be the view of the Hangang River. It was magnificient both in the day and night. Location wise - it does stray a bit further from the city center but a nice change of area to stay if you've been to Seoul many times already. Overall, it was a decent stay!
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback with us. We are delighted to hear that your four-night stay with your group was enjoyable and that the final part of your Korea trip ended on a positive note at Conrad Seoul.

It is wonderful to know that our check-in and concierge teams made a strong impression, and we truly appreciate your special recognition of Joy. Her warm, friendly, and attentive service reflects the hospitality we strive to deliver, and I will make sure your kind words are personally shared with her.

We are also pleased that you found the room clean and well maintained, and that the Dyson hair dryer and other amenities added convenience to your stay. The view of the Han River is indeed one of the highlights of our property, and we are glad it brought you enjoyment both day and night.

Thank you as well for sharing your thoughts on the location. While we are slightly removed from the city center, we’re happy to hear that it offered a refresh

The bedding, bathroom, and floor were clean, but there was some dust on the table and mini-bar area.

The staff were very friendly. The breakfast in the lounge was excellent!
reviews.response: 콘래드 서울을 선택해 주시고 귀중한 피드백을 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 위치와 라운지 조식, 직원 서비스에 만족해 주셔서 기쁘게 생각하며, 말씀해 주신 수영장 운영 및 객실 청결 관리 부분은 관련 부서와 공유하여 더욱 세심히 개선해 나가겠습니다. 앞으로도 편안하고 즐거운 호캉스 경험을 드릴 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다. 다시 뵙기를 기대합니다. 감사합니다. 콘래드 서울

reviews.title: Spacious and comfortable room, good bedding, excellent location.
reviews.text: A great location within walking distance to IFC and The Hyundai Mall, with large and comfortable room sizes. Room service is also decent in taste and price. We had a great time without any major inconveniences, even during peak season when it was fully booked.

콘래드 서울을 찾아주시고 소중한 후기를 남겨주셔서 감사드립니다.
더현대서울과 IFC몰에 도보로 이동 가능한 편리한 위치와 넓고 쾌적한 객실 크기에 만족해 주셨다니 기쁩니다. 또한, 룸서비스의 맛과 가격에도 긍정적인 평가를 주셔서 감사드립니다.

성수기 만실 상황에서도 불편 없이 즐거운 시간을 보내셨다니 저희에게도 큰 보람이 됩니다. 앞으로도 언제나 편안하고 만족스러운 경험을 제공해드릴 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다.

다시 뵐 날을 고대합니다.
감사합니다.
콘래드 서울
reviews.room_type: 2 QUEEN BEDS DELUXE ACCESSIBLE ROOM CITY VIEW

reviews.title: It's not worth staying at this price.
reviews.text: I booked an executive room for around 800,000 KRW. The hotel staff were all friendly, young, and quick, which was the most impressive aspect. I tried to file a complaint because the hose supplying water to the bathtub wasn't working, but I realized it wouldn't be fixed overnight, so I just gave up. The sink also didn't drain well. In terms of accessibility to The Hyundai Seoul and IFC Mall, it was very good. When there's nothing to do in the room, you can go downstairs to shop or watch a movie, so there are various options. If you book a room for around 300,000-400,000 KRW, it would be the most suitable.
reviews.response:
콘래드 서울을 찾아주시고 소중한 의견을 남겨주셔서 감사합니다.
직원들의 친절하고 신속한 서비스와 호텔의 위치에 대해 만족해 주셨다니 기쁘게 생각합니다. 특히 더현대서울과 IFC몰 인근의 편리한 접근성을 즐겨주셔서 감사드립니다.

다만, 욕조 호스와 세면대 배수 문제로 불편을 드린 점 진심으로 사과드립니다. 말씀해 주신 사항은 즉시 관련 부서와 공유하여 원인을 확인하고 개선 조치를 취하도록 하겠습니다.

앞으로는 객실 상태와 시설 점검을 더욱 철저히 하여, 가격대와 관계없이 만족스러운 경험을 제공해 드릴 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다. 다시 찾아주신다면 더 나은 모습으로 모실 것을 약속드립니다.

감사합니다.
Joanne Park
콘래드 서울

The room is large and view is actually nice. Also like the Xmas decorations in the hotel. First 2 days was good.

In the last night, which is Xmas eve, unfortunately both of us was suddenly very sick and can only lie on the bed.

reviews.text: So far, this is the best hotel ive ever stayed. The staffs are awesome... i went there with some friends and we wanna go to have fun in some nightclubs and we ask  the hotel staff, surprisingly they got back to us with some printout regarding the events that was going in the club. Furthermore they help us to book a table there and ask the club's staff to wait for us right in the front door because we cant speak korean. So as soon as our taxi arrived at the club's entrance, the club's staff are already waiting for us. The room is super comfortable, and the bathroom is also awesome. If you are going to seoul, you defly have to stay here. you dont want to miss out. and btw the room manager, Mr. Akshat Sinha (if i get his name right) is a super helpful and friendly person

reviews.title: Luxury hotel
reviews.text: A luxurious hotel. The staff is also top-notch. That said, it can be quite expensive to do anything at the hotel. My child ate the potato chips and Snickers in the room, which cost 6000w-7000w, and even on the breakfast plan, children's meals are not included, so for those aged 13 and over, it costs 67000w. If you choose a breakfast plan, it might be better to book as an adult rather than as a child.
reviews.response:
Dear TAKUJI 고객님,

소중한 후기와 높은 평점 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.

콘래드 서울의 시설과 직원들의 서비스에 대해 따뜻한 말씀 남겨주셔서 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다. 고객님께서 편안한 시간을 보내셨다니 큰 보람을 느끼며, “일류 호텔”이라는 소중한 평가에 깊이 감사드립니다.

또한 투숙 중 발생한 추가 비용과 관련하여 고객님의 솔직한 의견 남겨주셔서 감사드립니다. 미니바 및 조식 이용 정책에 대해 다소 아쉬움을 느끼신 점은 충분히 공감하며, 고객님의 소중한 의견은 관련 부서와 공유하여 앞으로 더욱 명확하고 편안한 안내가 이루어질 수 있도록 참고하겠습니다.

앞으로도 가족 모두가 더욱 만족스럽고 편안한 시간을 보내실 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다. 다시 한번 감사드리며, 다음 한국 방문 시 다시 모실 수 있기를 기대하겠습니다.

감사합니다.
콘래드 서울

reviews.title: Best service I have ever had, Truly 10 star experience, not 5 star experience
reviews.positives:
Location was perfect, only few minutes walk to the restaurant & shopping mall. This was stress free stay.
Front desk team were very kind & helpful.
The staff was welcoming right from the moment we checked in & very polite manner.
The room was clean, spacious & comfortable.
The view of the city from hotel was spectacular.
Hotel provided fresh linens. very clean.
We had a wonderful stay!!!
reviews.negatives: Nothing to say.

reviews.title: It was nice.
reviews.text: I don't think there is anywhere else in Seoul that offers a 2-queen bed at this price level. The location is great. It's very convenient to go to IFC Mall and it's also good for visiting department stores. However, the subway is a bit far. Since it was Chuseok, I received a duck gift, and they kindly checked the towels and water every morning and evening, so I didn't have to worry about free amenities. However, the room felt a bit dry, and even after turning off the air conditioning, it still felt quite dry, which wasn't great. There aren't many facilities for children (the sauna and gym are not available for children), so I knew that going in, but it was still disappointing. Breakfast was free for infants, which was a nice perk. The beautiful lobby and the nice TV stand and bar added to the travel vibe.
reviews.response:
콘래드 서울을 이용해 주시고 세심한 후기를 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.  
객실 구성과 위치, 그리고 전반적인 서비스에 만족하셨다니 매우 기쁩니다.  

추석 기간 동안 준비된 오리 선물을 비롯해, 아침과 저녁마다 진행된 타월 및 생수 체크 서비스에 대해 긍정적으로 평가해 주셔서 감사드립니다.  
직원들의 세심한 배려가 고객님께 편안함으로 전달되었다는 말씀은 팀 전체에 큰 격려가 될 것입니다.  

조식에서 유아 무료 제공 서비스를 만족스럽게 이용하셨다니 기쁘며, 로비와 객실 인테리어, 바 공간이 여행의 즐거움을 더해드렸다는 말씀에도 깊이 감사드립니다.  

앞으로도 고객님께서 다시 방문하고 싶은 호텔로 기억될 수 있도록, 세심한 서비스와 쾌적한 환경을 제공하기 위해 최선을 다하겠습니다.  

감사합니다.

reviews.title: Another short but good stay
reviews.positives: Amazing location and a great Hotel

reviews.title: I highly recommend it.
reviews.text:
I went on a hotel vacation with my friend, and the staff were really kind. Especially since my friend is in the early stages of pregnancy and might be sensitive, I was touched when they thoroughly checked everything from the room conditions to various other aspects after I mentioned it.

The breakfast was neat and delicious, and the pool was clean and beautiful. Fortunately, due to regular maintenance, the locker shower room was unavailable, but they took care to ensure it wasn't inconvenient for us, so we were able to use everything comfortably.

Although we stayed for just one day, thanks to their thoughtful consideration, I had a pleasant time and feel inclined to come back again. I recommend it!
reviews.response:
콘래드 서울을 방문해 주시고 소중한 후기를 남겨주셔서 감사합니다.
친구분과 함께한 호캉스에서 즐거운 시간을 보내셨고, 특히 임신 초기이신 친구분을 위해 준비한 작은 배려가 도움이 되었다니 저희도 마음이 따뜻해집니다.

깔끔하고 맛있는 조식, 깨끗하고 예쁜 수영장까지 만족해 주셔서 기쁘며, 정기 점검으로 일부 시설 이용에 제한이 있었음에도 불편하지 않게 느끼셨다니 큰 보람을 느낍니다.

짧은 하루였지만 편안한 휴식과 좋은 기억으로 남으셨다니 감사드리며, 다음 방문 때에도 기분 좋은 경험을 드릴 수 있도록 더욱 세심히 준비하겠습니다.

감사합니다.

reviews.title: It's possible to have a fun time with family for a day.
reviews.text:
(Pros) The room space is spacious. Good accessibility and directly connected to IFC. It is also connected to The Hyundai, allowing for various indoor activities regardless of the weather. The cleanliness is top-notch. The bathroom space is also large. There is a mid-cleaning service that is quite useful. The gym is also very good. The breakfast gets a bit crowded but is quite decent. The city view is great, offering a great view including Namsan Tower. 
(Cons) There is not much parking space, so you have to park near IFC (all connected underground). The swimming pool is very nice but tends to get quite crowded, and the locker room is very small (6 lockers). Check-in is at 4 PM... At 4 PM the swimming pool usage starts at 4 PM and then again at 6 PM, which leads to peak times in the pool. Inside the room, having a family (more than 3 people) means there is only one chair for room service (you can ask for more chairs...). Overall, the pros do cover the cons. However, it seems optimized for business premium rather than for family staycations. It would be best to visit during weekdays when it’s less crowded to enjoy time with the family!

reviews.title: An Exceptional Family Stay – True Hospitality at its Finest!
reviews.text: We recently completed a wonderful 6-day family trip to Seoul, and our stay at Conrad Seoul was undoubtedly the highlight of our journey. From the moment we stepped into the lobby, we were greeted with genuine smiles and a level of professionalism that truly sets this hotel apart. The entire staff is incredibly welcoming, well-trained, and professional, ensuring every detail of our stay was seamless. However, what made our experience truly unforgettable was the exceptional service at Zest. Being a family of vegetarians, we often find dining out to be a challenge. The Assistant Manager, Ellin, and Stella went above and beyond to accommodate our dietary needs. They personally helped us customize delicious vegetarian dishes and checked on us regularly to ensure everything was to our liking. We could deeply feel their warmth, passion, and sincere care for their guests. It wasn’t just a meal; it was world-class hospitality that made us feel right at home. The hotel facilities are top-notch, maintaining the high standards expected of the Conrad brand while adding a personal touch that is rare to find. We had a very pleasant stay and left with beautiful memories. I highly recommend Conrad Seoul to any tourists visiting the city. We will definitely be back on our next trip to Korea!

reviews.title: An amazing experience.
reviews.text:
Yeouido Hangang Park is one of our favourite places in Seoul. We booked the Conrad to experience this spectacular view to round out our trip. It was also a special occasion for us and we can't thank the staff for going above and beyond to help us celebrate. From the concierge to the waiters at breakfast the entire team was exceptional, even for a hotel of this calibre. The morning barista made the best coffee I've had since leaving Australia. We want to thank Conrad Seoul from the bottom of our hearts. We have now found our new regular stay for our frequent trips to South Korea. 

The access via the IFC Mall from the transit system was easy to navigate. The lobby design was subtle but inspiring. Access to the outside was discrete once check in was complete. The rooms are well looked after and room service was intelligently priced and well made. We also recommend the buffet breakfast which contained the variety one would expect, yet it was also a clever selection catering to all tastes.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for sharing such a heartfelt and beautifully written review of your stay with us.
We are truly honored that you chose Conrad Seoul to complete your trip and celebrate such a special occasion, especially with Yeouido Hangang Park being one of your favorite places in Seoul. It means a great deal to us to know that the spectacular view, along with the care and dedication of our team, helped make your experience so memorable.

We are delighted to hear that every touchpoint—from our concierge and breakfast service team to the morning barista—made a lasting impression, and that the coffee reminded you of home in Australia. Your kind words about the lobby design, seamless access via IFC Mall, thoughtful room upkeep, and well-balanced room service and breakfast offerings truly reflect the details we strive to perfect.

Knowing that Conrad Seoul has become your new regular stay for future visits to South Korea is the highest compliment we could receive. We sincerely thank yo

reviews.title: Review of Family Trip to Conrad Hotel Seoul
reviews.text:
Recently, I stayed for one night at the Conrad Hotel located in Yeouido, Seoul with my family. Overall, it was a very satisfying experience.

First of all, the location is really good. It's a short walk to the Han River Park from the hotel, so in the evening, we could take a stroll along the Han River and enjoy the night view of Seoul. Everyone in the family was thoroughly immersed in the atmosphere.

The hotel's interior facilities were clean and luxurious, and the room condition was excellent. The bedding was soft and clean, so the kids slept well. We also tried room service, and the food was nicely presented, and the staff was friendly and attentive, which left a great impression.

The dining area in the basement was quite nice as well. There were various restaurants to choose from according to our tastes, and the wait times were not long. There were also convenience stores, supermarkets, and cafes nearby, so we had no inconveniences.

Overall, I would recommend this hotel for family travelers. It was the perfect place to feel a sense of relaxation in the city, along with taking a walk by the Han River.

reviews.title: A journey with 0.01% of regret.
reviews.text:
I stayed in the Executive Riverview Room with my family to celebrate my father's 60th birthday. I believe the Conrad is an optimized hotel for enjoying not only its facilities but also shopping, as it is connected to the IFC Mall and The Hyundai Seoul underground.

During our stay, the most touching point was when the head concierge was informed that we were celebrating my father's birthday, and they prepared a cake and wine along with a long letter. My father was very pleased, and I thought I made the right choice in selecting the Conrad. I would like to express my gratitude once again to Team Leader Park.

Additionally, the benefits for executive guests were very satisfying. However, there was a slightly unpleasant incident during the use of Pulse 8 golf practice facilities, and I wanted to share my thoughts on it.

On December 22nd, around 6:30 PM, my family completed our Happy Hour included with the executive room and visited Pulse 8. I informed the desk staff that we wanted to use the golf practice range for 40 minutes, and while he was explaining, he asked “I’m sorry, but may I ask if that customer (pointing to my father) has been drinking?” Since my father tends to get red-faced even after just a drink, I confirmed that. The staff then stated that “for safety reasons, any area of Pulse 8 cannot be accessed if alcohol has been consumed, even a sip.” We were taken aback as we had not been informed of this beforehand, and while it would have been nice to know, we acknowledged the hotel’s policy and planned to return after a short break. However, the staff member said, “I cannot assure you if it will be possible at that time.” When I said we would come back tomorrow morning if it didn’t work out, he mentioned “there are many customers on weekday mornings.” While I felt a bit uncomfortable during the conversation, I tried to think that he was just following the rules. The real issue arose when we returned around 9 PM, about 2 hours and 30 minutes later. I informed the staff that we were the guests who visited earlier, and my father and younger brother were coming with me. I asked if we could use the facilities since some time had passed, to which he replied, “Oh, are you referring to the drunken person from earlier?” and said, “We would need to see when you arrive.” I did not understand the choice of words at that moment. My father had only participated in the Happy Hour included with our stay, and was not a drunkard. The staff seemed to judge my father’s condition solely based on his complexion, which made me think there should be clearer criteria for judgments like this. After looking at my father and tilting his head, the staff asked him to take a sip of water before using the facilities.

Overall, I can see that the staff member was following company policy. However, it was disappointing that the words and expression used while explaining these regulations felt somewhat unpleasant for a five-star hotel experience.

I hope that future guests will not have to experience a similar situation and that there will be accurate guidance regarding Pulse 8's usage policies. Nevertheless, as my pleasant experience at Conrad Seoul is more prominent in my memory, I look forward to visiting again on our next family trip. Thank you.

reviews.title: I have learned how to spend money.
reviews.text:
I always felt a resistance to experiencing new places, just saving all the time. 

I thought it would be nice to try this kind of experience once a year.

I also switched my phone plan to a budget phone. 
After saving that amount for a year, I realized I could enjoy a day here.

I realized the importance of spending money where it matters (value). While maintaining frugality, spending properly where it's needed is what makes one wealthy, and my stay at the Conrad Hotel was the starting point for me.

In particular, I learned and felt a lot from observing the staff's customer service. (There are many things I can apply to running a small business.)

Thank you for the wonderful memories.

reviews.title: Best location!! Delicious breakfast!!
reviews.text: I stayed one night with my two elementary school kids. I found a 5-star hotel in Seoul with two double beds, and since the location and price were both good, I made a reservation and stayed. The National Assembly, KBS, Yeouido Park, Hangang Park, The Hyundai Department Store, IFC Mall, Yeouido Transit Center, and more were all within walking distance, so we parked the car and walked around, or took the bus for a stop or two when it was too tiring. There were so many places to eat and visit nearby that one night felt too short. The hotel service was friendly and good, and the breakfast was delicious!! I highly recommend the breakfast!!!! When we checked out, we left behind some of our kids' belongings, and I was very, very grateful they found it for us!!!!! I really, really recommend this~~

reviews.negatives: Ich wollte einmal am Nachmittag eine Sitzung mit meinem Kollegen haben und mussten den Frühstücksraum verlassen, weil gestaubsaugt wurde. Wir wurden etwas aufgefordert, den Raum zu verlassen. Die gleiche Dame liess mich dann ab einem Tag vorher einige Minuten warten. Ich finde beide zuvor genannten Punkte für ein 5-Sternehotel speziell, das sollte man schon zur Verfügung stellen und auch etwas flexibler sein. reviews.title: One of the best 5-star hotels in Seoul.
reviews.text:
1. Accessibility and Location

In most areas, there seems to be a bus route that can be reached within one transfer. 

Access to IFC Mall through the hotel basement. 
The Hyundai Department Store is a 1-minute walk away.
The Han River and Yeouido Park are a 5-minute walk away.

2. Staff Attitude

During my one-night stay, I communicated with about 5-6 staff members both in person and by phone, and everyone was extremely friendly.

Even at 5-star hotels, there are a few where the staff are particularly unfriendly, but there was no discomfort at Conrad at all.

3. Room

I was lucky to be assigned a Han River view room, and if possible, I think it's worth paying an extra fee to stay in that view room.

While the Han River view is beautiful, there are many other tall buildings nearby, so if you're unlucky with the view, it could turn out quite disappointing...

Even though it was the most basic deluxe room, the room was spacious, the bathroom was also spacious, and it was very comfortable.

4. Hygiene

Overall clean, but... the bathtub needs a little more attention when cleaning. I found two short hairs in the corner of the bathtub wall...

Aside from this point, I was satisfied with my stay.
100% willing to stay again.

reviews.title: The best hotel with location services and breakfast included.
reviews.text:
On New Year's Day, I visited for a family ho-kang (hotel + vacation) and although there was a long check-in line, the front desk staff who assisted us was very kind, the cleanliness of the room was perfect, and the river view was beautiful. The staff responsible for cleaning the room also checked if we needed anything, which was a nice touch. I appreciated that a staff member came to call us for the waiting area at the pool. 

Breakfast also had a wait, but there was a waiting area that was very spacious and had a nice atmosphere, so I was satisfied and enjoyed the breakfast, which is the highlight of the ho-kang experience. 

There's not a lot of hotels in Seoul that can accommodate three guests, and we had a great time with the breakfast-included rate. 

Moreover, the hotel's location connects to The Hyundai and IFC Mall, making it great for shopping or taking out food to enjoy in the room. Thanks to this, we had a happy time. 

I recommend this hotel for those going with family or as a couple.

reviews.title: Best staycation
reviews.text: I booked the executive corner suite for my birthday weekend and had a great time.  The room was immaculate with huge windows overlooking the river in both the lounge area and the bedroom.  The bathroom was also gigantic with a big tub next to another big window.  Happy hour in the executive lounge was really nice on the Friday, but a little busy on Saturday.  We were offered breakfast at the restaurant downstairs on Saturday morning and had it in the executive lounge on Sunday.  I would try to arrive to the happy hour and breakfast in the lounge early if you want get the good seats.  The staff always called me by name on the phone and in the lounge, and room service delivered ice for our small gathering more times than I can remember.

reviews.text: Nice place
reviews.response:
안녕하십니까,
콘래드 서울에서 정중히 인사드립니다.

먼저 고객님의 숙박 장소로 콘래드 서울을 선택해 주셔서 감사드립니다.
저희는 설문 조사를 통해 고객님께서 콘래드 서울에서 즐겁고 기분 좋은 숙박을 하신 것을 알게되어 대단히 기쁘게 생각합니다.

고객님께서 보내주신 소중한 의견에 깊은 감사를 드리며, 이와 같은 의견은 저희가 모든 고객님께 제공하는 서비스 및 제품의 질 향상과 지속적인 모니터링에 매우 큰 도움이 될 것 입니다.

빠른 시일내에 고객님을 콘래드 서울에서 다시 모시기를 기대합니다.
감사합니다.

reviews.title: ヒルトン系列のトップレベルにしては、スタッフ教育が非常に悪い。
reviews.text:
①2泊して2日目の深夜にお部屋へ戻り、びっくり。ベッドシーツが皺いっぱいのまま。洗面台の大理石に石鹸の痕が残ったまま。くず入れの籠に捨てたごみがそのまま。お部屋のお掃除が不完全。
②翌日のチェックアウト時に部屋を交換して頂いたので、キーを2部屋分渡すと、料金2部屋分請求へ、事情説明して納得してもらう。不快なクレームがホテルのスタッフに伝わっていないので、何を問題あったの？と云う不自然かつ気分を害する対応になる。
③３７Fのグリル、バーにてオーダーしてもなかなか持って来られない。（ウイスキーのオーダーに対して約30分要する）
reviews.positives: 出来て1年ですから、ハードが綺麗。空港からのリムジンバスが乗り入れ。漢江の眺め。

reviews.title: うー〜ん
reviews.text:
まず、、冷蔵庫にいつのかわからない開封済みの牛乳が入っていて驚愕
(驚き過ぎて賞味期限確認するのを忘れた)
この件でフロントに韓国の友人が連絡をしてくれたけどその対応が不愉快だったとの事(電話に出ない、対応が横柄)
そして担当ではないお掃除の方が来て謝って行ったけど、、、うーむ、、それは違うだろと思う

更にスーツケースを一階で預けたら1時間以上待っても部屋に来ないので電話したらすぐ持って来た(用意できてたならさっさと持ってきて！)

オマケにベッド横のコントローラーが壊れて朝ブラインドを上げられず(ハンガンビューなのに)

洗面所のティッシュケースのティッシュも残り少なかったらしくすぐ無くなる
(もう呼び出す気力無し

そしてラウンジは付けなくても良いかな次回泊まるなら、、(フードが:::

色々あり過ぎて最後は笑えて来たコンラッドステイ

空港に近い、ビューが良いと言う点くらいで値段の割にうーんと言う感じ

ただチェックアウトの際に一連の事を話した際の対応は良かったので再度宿泊してみるのもありかな？？？？？？
reviews.response:
Warm greetings from Conrad Seoul.

Thank you for taking the time to share such detailed feedback regarding your recent stay. We are deeply sorry for the series of inconveniences you experienced, from the condition of the minibar to service delays, room facility issues, and the Executive Lounge experience. These are certainly not the standards we strive to uphold, and I sincerely apologize for the disappointment caused.

Please be assured that each of the matters you mentioned—particularly the opened milk carton, response from the Front Desk, luggage delivery delay, and in-room equipment issues—has been shared with the relevant teams for immediate review and corrective action.

While I regret that your overall experience fell short of expectations, I am grateful for your acknowledgment of the pleasant check-out interaction and your willingness to consider staying with us again. It would be our privilege to welcome you back and ensure a much more seamless and enjoyable stay.

Thank you o

reviews.title: 残念でした
reviews.text:
クラブフロアに2泊しました。
ラウンジは品数多くないものの過ごしやすく満足。

1泊目の夜TVが映らないこと気づき、フロントに電話。
年配の男性が見にきてリセットしても動かずフロントに報告。
そのまま私に電話代わって、テレビは故障してるので見たいなら今日か明日別部屋を用意するとのこと。
現地のTV番組見るのも楽しみにしてたので、そのまま変更を依頼。
10分くらいで用意できるようにする、と答えたまでは良かったが。

そこから部屋を手配した連絡は20分後、部屋番号まで言われたがそのまま待つよう指示されて待ちぼうけ。
催促したらすぐ人を手配する、と言うのでどのくらいか聞いたら沈黙。
こちらが10分くらい？と聞いたら、そう、とのこと。

GW明け平日で混んでるようには見えなかったが。
お詫びも不十分、結局24時近くまでかかり対応が残念だった。

その後変わった部屋はシャワールームのドアが壊れそうな程の異音。（これは本当に壊れそうだったので清掃の人に伝えて直してもらった）

ハンドソープがありそうな位置にボディクリームがあったり、随所に違和感。

その前日に明洞でロイヤルホテル泊まったが4つ星でも全く不備がなかったので、ただただ我々と相性が合わなかったんだと諦めた。
パルナスを定宿にしてますが、たまには他なと思い期待値が高過ぎたのだと思います。
reviews.response:
Warm greetings from Conrad Seoul.

First and foremost, thank you for having chosen Conrad Seoul as the hotel of choice for your recent stay.

Also, we would like to thank you for completing the guest questionnaire for our hotel. We are indeed pleased to learn that you have enjoyed your stay at Conrad Seoul.

We appreciate your feedback as it is only through caring guests such as yourself and through your feedback that we are able to continually monitor and improve both the quality of our products and standards of services provided.

With this in mind we once again thank you for your feedback and we most certainly do look forward to welcoming you back to our hotel as our valued guest in the future.

Sincerely,
Thank you.

融通が利かないような感じもあったので、ホスピタリティやホテルの方たちに

reviews.title: 部屋と浴室は良いが、廊下の騒音が聞こえ、スタッフの対応は悪くないが難あり。
reviews.text: 豪華で有名なビジネスホテルのはずだったが、何人ものタクシーの運転手が知らなかった。スタッフ対応はまあ親切だったが、隣接レストランの紹介等に関しては決して良くなかった。客室は良かったが、ベッド２つの部屋に２人で泊まったのに、椅子が１個しかなく不便だった。浴室は非常に良くできていた。が、廊下の音が煩かったのと、客室ドアの外から客室内の声がかなり聞こえた。ロビーのレイアウトが悪く、待ち合わせなどには不便だったし、飲み物などを頼まなければ、数十分も座っていては困ると言われた。
reviews.positives: 客室は快適で、浴室は便利にできて、清潔だった。

reviews.text:

残念だったのは、滞在した日が祝日だったため、レストランが混在していたことです。食事の際、途中退席中にテーブルを片付けられ、席がなくなった事にはかなり驚きました。その後の対応は早かったです。すぐに広めの席を用意していただけました。
同じようなミスが起こらないよう、対策は考えていただきたいなと思います。

何度行っても気持ちの良いホテルです。みんなにお勧めのホテルです。ですが、
前に工事中であるものが立てられると漢江は見えないのかしら~~そうなってほしくないけど・・
reviews.positives: Staffの親切さ。漢江が見える部屋。迅速な対応すべてに満足する

reviews.title: さすがの一言に尽きます！
reviews.text:
空港よりは、近いイメージです。
ホテルが新しいので、運転手さんには『ＩＦＣモール』と言ったほうが良いようです。
チェックインの際にホテルの従業員の方は英語しか話せませんでした。カタコトの日本語も分からなかったので、英語が不得手だと大変かも。。
あまり広くはありませんが、ホテルのロビーラウンジのサービスも良いし、ケーキ類もおいしかったです。
一緒に行った友人がエステを受けたのですが、ジャグジーなどの設備は無い様で、エステは10分前ほどからしか入れなかったようです。

ホテルの設備はとても良く、漢河の眺めもすごく良かったのですが、周りは本当に開発中でＺＡＲＡ・バナリパ・Ｈ＆Ｍなどのお店が入った新しいモールがあるだけで、ショッピングを楽しみたい方にはちょっとお勧めできません。
reviews.positives: お土産のコンラッドベアが頂けた事と、ホテルの設備も何もかも素敵でした！

reviews.title: 快適でした
reviews.text: 今回初めて汝矣島に泊まりました。地下鉄からのアクセスもよく、ホテルはいつも快適に整えられていました。また泊まりたいです。

Warm greetings from Conrad Seoul and thank you very much for taking the time to share your experience with us.

We thank you once again for your loyalty to the Hilton family of hotels, and most of all for choosing the Conrad Seoul as your hotel of choice.

Thank you.

reviews.title: 漢江ビュー
reviews.text:
今回は親子女子旅での宿泊で、高級ホテルを色々と検討しましたが、立地、漢江ビュー、そしてザヒュンダイソウルの目の前が決め手となり予約しました。
朝起きても漢江が見えるのは本当に気持ち良かったです。
お部屋も広くて満足
シャンプー、コンディショナー等のアメニティは持ち帰れるものではなかったのが残念でした。SDGsなので仕方ないですね。
また、泊まりたいと思えたホテルでした。
漢江ビューは貴重です。
reviews.response:
Warm greetings from Conrad Seoul.

First and foremost, thank you for having chosen Conrad Seoul as the hotel of choice for your recent stay.

Also, we would like to thank you for completing the guest questionnaire for our hotel. We are indeed pleased to learn that you have enjoyed your stay at Conrad Seoul.

We appreciate your feedback as it is only through caring guests such as yourself and through your feedback that we are able to continually monitor and improve both the quality of our products and standards of services provided.

With this in mind we once again thank you for your feedback and we most certainly do look forward to welcoming you back to our hotel as our valued guest in the future.

Sincerely,

reviews.title: 初めての汝矣島エリアステイ
reviews.text:
以前汝矣島エリアは漢江の船が浮かぶ辺りを散歩してとても楽しかった思い出があり今回はコンラッドのある漢江ビューが素晴らしいこちらのホテルを選びました。

2泊目の深夜にエンジニアのミスで火災報知器が鳴り、36階からフロントまで非常階段を降りるアクシデントがありましたが私も同行者もまだ若いから耐えられました。
ホテルに併設されたジムが素晴らしく喜んでくれました。

We are excited to see your awesome rating and happy to hear that you experienced our exceptional hospitality. Next time you are in the area, we would love to have you stay with us again! Thanks for taking the time to leave us your feedback, as it means a lot to us.


Kind Regards,
Conrad Seoul

reviews.text:
汝矣島の駅からそれほど近くない。途中ムービングウォークもあるが、一度ショッピングセンターの中を抜けるのでわかりずらい。ホテルへの道案内が途中でなくなたっりするので困った。
ホテル自体は高級感や風格があり、料金相応。スタッフのレベルも高く、また来たいと思わせるものがあった。朝食も非常に美味しかった。汝矣島自体が都心から離れているので、頻繁に部屋に帰ってこれないところが不便。特に江南地区にショッピングに行くとなるとかなりの移動が必要なのもマイナス点だ。総じて素晴らしいホテルだと思う。

フレンドリーなスタッフがあったから、また行きたいホテルです。
